title: HPE ProLiant Gen11 Servers
description: Industry-leading rack and tower servers engineered for performance, reliability, and intelligent automation — ideal for modern enterprise workloads.

title: Dell PowerEdge Rack Servers
description: Scalable rack servers delivering exceptional compute density and efficiency for data centres of all sizes, with integrated lifecycle management.

title: NetApp AFF All-Flash Storage
description: High-performance all-flash storage arrays delivering ultra-low latency and enterprise reliability for mission-critical databases and applications.

title: Dell EMC PowerStore
description: Intelligent, adaptable storage platform with built-in machine learning for predictive analytics, seamless scalability, and simplified management.

title: Veritas NetBackup
description: Enterprise-class backup and recovery solution protecting physical, virtual, and cloud workloads with automated policy management and deduplication.

title: HPE StoreEver Tape Library
description: Cost-effective, high-capacity tape archiving and long-term data retention solution with LTO technology and intelligent media management.

title: Cisco Catalyst Switches
description: Enterprise-grade switching infrastructure offering high availability, advanced security features, and simplified network operations for campus and branch environments.

title: Juniper EX Series Switches
description: High-performance Ethernet switches for modern enterprise networks featuring zero-touch provisioning, advanced security, and AI-driven operations.
